creator: szymluk86@gmail.com
text:
Hi,
After upgrading to the current 53.0.3, Firefox restarts my PC, I think.
I think this is problem with Firefox's HTML in sites with HTML included, f. e. YT, because, as I see, restarts are often when YT is running.

In previous version of Firefox problem did not exist.

Logs from vt are useless, because vt is clear.

Info about my box:

FreeBSD maszynka 11.0-RELEASE-p9 FreeBSD 11.0-RELEASE-p9 #0: Tue Apr 11 08:48:40 UTC 2017 root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Thanks for help.
